textPlain: I rolled my own outdoor laptop, using an old Dasung e-ink monitor, power bank, and latte panda SBC. Works great for outdoor coding. Cut the chassis out of 1/2' plywood on the CNC router. Dual boots vanilla Windows and Linux. Picture here: https://imgur.com/a/RrpPjET
Anyone know if you could run vs code on one of these beasts?
Wow this is awesome, I think you’ve inspired me to try and make something similar…
it’s Android so you’d need to use the VS code web app. Maybe remote desktop?
